steps.title: Notice Francie's persistence
steps.content: The passage centers on Francie's plan to read all the books in the library alphabetically. Even though she has been reading for a long time, is still in the B's, and finds some books difficult, she keeps going because she is a reader.

steps.title: Avoid too narrow purposes
steps.content: Choice A focuses on an unusual topic, but the passage lists many topics. Choice B claims she prefers reading over other activities, which is not compared. Choice D centers on one admired book, while the passage is about a long reading goal. The answer is C.
